title: [10-Pack]Glass Meal Prep Containers -MCIRCO Food Storage Containers with Lifetime Lasting Snap Locking Lids, Airtight Lunch Containers, Microwave, Oven, Freezer and Dishwasher
features: 10 PACK GLASS MEAL PREP CONTAINERS: With 5 36oz containers and 5 13oz containers, they are ideal for meal prepping. Save time by cooking and freezing your meals for later
PREMIUM GLASS:Our glass storage containers are made from premium borosilicate glass, which is stronger and can adjust to temperature changes much better than cheaper glass food storage containers

AIRTIGHT SMART-LOCKING LIDS: MCIRCO Glass food storage containers use snap lock lids that comes with silicone seals to ensure your meal prep food will last much longer than normal plastic food storage containers. These lids are easy to use and will stop leaking. These lids will not break or slowly stop working

USER FRIENDLY: Easy to use and easy to take care of, as it’s microwave, freezer and dishwasher friendly, and oven friendly for over 500 degrees Fahrenheit. Take off the lids before placing in oven and microwave
SPACE-SAVING: The food storage containers have stackable design, can keep refrigerator, home and kitchen organized, and leave more space on your kitchen slabs and cabinets
description: Product Description Enjoy home-cooked meal anytime and anywhere. Fantastic Family Helper Allow you to better organize and storage your meals individually at home. Simply prepare your favorite meals once and store the leftovers. Save your time and relieve your stress of cooking different dinner every night. Great Office Assistant Allow you to bring meal and have lunch in office. Nothing is better than having a meal ready to go when you’re starving after a workout! Encourage you to cook your meals at home and enjoy healthier food. Excellent Picnic Tool Allow you to have a picnic with your family and friends. Pack a full meal for long trips to the countryside or easily control your daily intake when dieting. The premium look and perfect design of upgraded snap locking lids ensure great meal prep. Why Choose MCIRCO? Our glass storage containers are made of premium borosilicate glass, which is stronger than cheaper glass food storage containers. MCIRCO glass meal prep containers allow you to better organize and storage your meals and leftovers at home, to bring meal and have your lunch in office, to enjoy picnic time with your family and friends... Our products will save your time and relieve your stress of cooking different dinner every night. Nothing is better than having a meal ready to go when you’re starving after a workout! Tip1: Please wash the containers and lids upon arrival to protect the rubber seals from sticking to the glass containers. Tip2: The rubber seal was designed to removed from the lids for washing conveniently, so if the seal falls apart, please put it back. Products Features 5x34oz(8"x6.5"x3") 5x13oz(6"x4.5"x2.1") Borosilicate Glass Upgraded Plastic Snap Locking Lids with Silicone Seal Working temperature: from -4℉ –752℉ (-20℃ – 400℃) Microwave, Oven, Freezer, Dishwasher Friendly Please take off the lids before placing in dishwasher, oven and microwave for better maintenance. Easy to use and easy to take care of. Can be used for baking or cooking in the oven, safe for over 500 degrees Fahrenheit. Can be used for heating in the microwave. The borosilicate glass makes it can go straight from the refrigerator to the microwave or oven to the table. Can be used for freezing in the refrigerator. Make your freezer more organized. Can be used for washing in the dishwasher. Save your time and make your life much more convenient.

specifications_table.Recommended Uses For Product: Cereal, Dry fruits and nuts, Fruit, Meat, Rice, Vegetables
